10111010101000000010010001111111001101 - ASI: 20

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  101 = 1 * 01
  110 = 11 * 0
  111 = 1 * 11
  00001 = 000 * 01
  01000 = 01 * 000
  01101 = 01 * 101
  11110 = 11 * 110
  001000 = 0 * 01000
  110101 = 110 * 101
  001000111 = 001000 * 111
  101110101 = 101 * 110101
  0100000001 = 01000 * 00001
  1111001101 = 11110 * 01101
  0010001111111001101 = 001000111 * 1111001101
  1011101010100000001 = 101110101 * 0100000001
  10111010101000000010010001111111001101 = 1011101010100000001 * 0010001111111001101
